training_data_statement: Uses the gen22_hybrid_full_0.0595 checkpoint with vote101 runtime aggregation, minichunk threshold 0.0595, and parent cutoff 66/101.
data_attestation: This miner does not train on validator-private human data.
private_data_attestation: This miner does not train on validator-private human data.
notes: gen22 hybrid full checkpoint scored with deterministic vote101 sampling, minichunk threshold 0.0595, and parent cutoff 66/101.
